steps.title: Apply the distributive property
steps.content:
To expand $7(x^{2}+5)$, multiply 7 by each term inside the parentheses:

$$7(x^{2}+5) = 7 \cdot x^{2} + 7 \cdot 5$$

steps.title: Simplify and match to the choices
steps.content:
Evaluate each product:

$$7x^{2} + 7(5) = 7x^{2} + 35$$

This simplified form matches choice A — A is correct.
